approvalSource: Steve approved continuing the Foundation gold-capture and capability sprint card-by-card after all gold from the long planning conversation was captured.
notes: Approved to generate honest Agent Inventory from current Foundation registry/job truth and old-system evidence only. Do not approve agent runtime, old-code import, hidden workers, model/provider calls, extraction, external writes, private profile copying, or Value Builder split.
approvedChanges: Add reusable PILLAR-5 Agent Inventory generator module.
Generate JSON and Markdown agent/job inventory artifacts from current agent registry, Foundation job definitions, old-system agent roster evidence, and old-system research harvest truth.
Add focused proof and closeout wiring for PILLAR-5.
Advance Current Sprint to SYSTEM-004 after closeout.
notNext: No agent launch, hidden subagent, worker launch, provider/model call, live extraction, source-system mutation, external write/send, Drive permission mutation, credential mutation, or provider config change.
No import of old-system code, prompts, or old WORKING status as current runtime truth.
No private profile content, team emails, chat IDs, raw memories, tokens, or secret values in generated artifacts.
No System Capabilities UI surface; that is SYSTEM-004.
